testcase.classname: KafkaUtil initConnection should initialize Kafka consumer and connect successfully
testcase.name: KafkaUtil initConnection should initialize Kafka consumer and connect successfully

testcase.classname: KafkaUtil initConnection should throw an error if connection fails
testcase.name: KafkaUtil initConnection should throw an error if connection fails

testcase.classname: KafkaUtil connect should log an error when consumer fails to connect
testcase.name: KafkaUtil connect should log an error when consumer fails to connect

testcase.classname: execute should initialize KafkaConsumerController and call consumeMessage
testcase.name: execute should initialize KafkaConsumerController and call consumeMessage

testcase.classname: KafkaConsumerController should subscribe to the correct topic and process messages
testcase.name: KafkaConsumerController should subscribe to the correct topic and process messages

testcase.classname: KafkaConsumerController should handle errors during message processing
testcase.name: KafkaConsumerController should handle errors during message processing

testcase.classname: PackageStatusService updateStatus should update status if it exists in the database
testcase.name: PackageStatusService updateStatus should update status if it exists in the database

testcase.classname: PackageStatusService updateStatus should insert status if it does not exist in the database
testcase.name: PackageStatusService updateStatus should insert status if it does not exist in the database

testcase.classname: PackageStatusService updateStatus should handle errors thrown during database queries
testcase.name: PackageStatusService updateStatus should handle errors thrown during database queries

testcase.classname: PackageStatusService checkTypeMessage should return "daily" for D-prefixed headerId
testcase.name: PackageStatusService checkTypeMessage should return "daily" for D-prefixed headerId

testcase.classname: PackageStatusService checkTypeMessage should return "emergency" for E-prefixed headerId
testcase.name: PackageStatusService checkTypeMessage should return "emergency" for E-prefixed headerId

testcase.classname: PackageStatusService checkTypeMessage should return "Initial" for other headerId prefixes
testcase.name: PackageStatusService checkTypeMessage should return "Initial" for other headerId prefixes

testcase.classname: PackageStatusService isStatusExist should return true if status exists in the database
testcase.name: PackageStatusService isStatusExist should return true if status exists in the database

testcase.classname: PackageStatusService isStatusExist should return false if status does not exist in the database
testcase.name: PackageStatusService isStatusExist should return false if status does not exist in the database

testcase.classname: PackageStatusService insert should throw an error if DB query fails
testcase.name: PackageStatusService insert should throw an error if DB query fails

testcase.classname: Utility Class Tests getDateNow should return the current date in the specified format
testcase.name: Utility Class Tests getDateNow should return the current date in the specified format

testcase.name: Utility Class Tests getDateNowByFormat should return the current date in a custom format

testcase.classname: Utility Class Tests dateFormat should convert date from one format to another
testcase.name: Utility Class Tests dateFormat should convert date from one format to another

testcase.classname: Utility Class Tests calculateTimeDifference should calculate the time difference correctly
testcase.name: Utility Class Tests calculateTimeDifference should calculate the time difference correctly

testcase.classname: Utility Class Tests replaceEnd should replace ",end" with ";" and append "end" if needed
testcase.name: Utility Class Tests replaceEnd should replace ",end" with ";" and append "end" if needed

testcase.classname: Utility Class Tests encode should return the input string without encoding
testcase.name: Utility Class Tests encode should return the input string without encoding

testcase.name: FileUtil readFile should read the file correctly

testcase.name: FileUtil readFile should log an error and throw if an error occurs

testcase.name: RabbitMqUtil createChannel should create a channel successfully

testcase.name: RabbitMqUtil createChannel should throw an error if connection fails

testcase.name: RabbitMqUtil publishMessage should publish a message successfully

testcase.name: RabbitMqUtil publishMessage should throw an error if publish fails

testcase.name: MySqlDbUtil getConnection should get a connection from the read pool

testcase.classname: MySqlDbUtil getConnection should get a connection from the write pool
testcase.name: MySqlDbUtil getConnection should get a connection from the write pool

testcase.name: MySqlDbUtil queryWithTransaction should handle a transaction successfully
